大小单双带赚计划【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-238817756_62876049<br>vk.com/topic-238909188_63016276<br>vk.com/topic-238909174_62518506<br>vk.com/topic-238909187_63963169<br>vk.com/topic-238881989_63327152<br>vk.com/topic-238909910_63633289<br>vk.com/topic-238909182_63124185<br>vk.com/topic-238909178_63016420<br>vk.com/topic-238909173_62748994<br>vk.com/topic-238909172_63124266<br>vk.com/topic-238817752_63124371<br>vk.com/topic-238909928_63016671<br>vk.com/topic-238909207_63963379<br>vk.com/topic-238909186_62876387<br>vk.com/topic-238817756_62876447<br>vk.com/topic-238894531_64181842<br>vk.com/topic-238909180_63633584<br>vk.com/topic-238909206_62876499<br>vk.com/topic-238909187_63963501<br>vk.com/topic-238815834_62519036<br>vk.com/topic-238909910_63633689<br>vk.com/topic-238909178_63016933<br>vk.com/topic-238909185_62431870<br>vk.com/topic-238909176_62876682<br>vk.com/topic-238817752_63124720<br>vk.com/topic-238909179_63327702<br>vk.com/topic-238909189_63327725<br>vk.com/topic-238909184_62519267<br>vk.com/topic-238888951_64182111<br>vk.com/topic-238881989_63327839<br>vk.com/topic-238815834_62519409<br>vk.com/topic-238909206_62876966<br>vk.com/topic-238909177_63963893<br>vk.com/topi
